label: Room stat
description: Defines a numeric stat measured for a room - impressiveness, cleanliness, wealth - and the curve that converts the raw score to a quality stage.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# RoomStatWorker subclass that calculates this stat's score for a given room.

updatePriority.label: Update priority
updatePriority.description: Higher priority stats are recalculated before lower priority stats. Use when one stat depends on another.

displayRounded.label: Display rounded
displayRounded.description: If true, the stat score shown in the room inspector is rounded to the nearest integer.

isHidden.label: Hidden
isHidden.description: If true, this stat does not appear in the room inspector UI.

roomlessScore.label: Roomless score
roomlessScore.description: Score assigned when no enclosing room exists (e.g., outdoors).

scoreStages.label: Score stages
scoreStages.description: Ordered list of quality stages with label and minimum score threshold.

inputStat.label: Input stat
inputStat.description: Another RoomStatDef whose score is used as input by this stat's worker.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: Piecewise linear curve that maps this stat's raw score to a display value or quality index.

basic-room-stat.label: Basic room stat
basic-room-stat.description: A minimal room stat with a worker class.
